caption: A man with long hair tied back and glasses stands before a microphone in an indoor setting with a beige slatted wall backdrop. He is wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a black embroidered vest, and a red and white decorative accessory around his neck. The word "ORCA" appears as a watermark in the lower right of each scene. In the background, the tops of people's heads are visible, suggesting an audience. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks into the microphone, his facial expressions shifting slightly as he articulates. He remains in a stationary position, though his head moves subtly to follow the rhythm of his speech. The microphone on a boom arm remains positioned in front of him throughout the clip.
